feature.name: Google Drive Presentation Knowledge Base
feature.summary: Telegram bot feature for searching, indexing, commenting on, and uploading team presentations stored in a single Google Drive root folder with nested subfolders.

problem: The team stores presentations in Google Drive but needs a faster Telegram-based way to find relevant decks, retrieve links, and keep the library organized.
goals: Search presentations from Telegram using natural-language requests
Index a single Google Drive root folder recursively
Search by file name and presentation content
Ask clarifying questions when several files match
Show similar files when no exact match exists
Store one internal text comment per presentation
Support file intake through a dedicated Telegram topic
Suggest folders or create new folders during upload
Restrict access to members of the authorized Telegram group
nonGoals: Multiple comments or comment history per file
Fine-grained role-based permissions within the allowed team
Support for multiple Google Drive roots in MVP
Public or external access outside the Telegram group

primary.constraint: Must be a member of Telegram group 3784470567

unauthorized: Users who are not members of Telegram group 3784470567

userStories.title: Search for a presentation
userStories.iWant: to ask the bot for a presentation in natural language
userStories.soThat: I can quickly get the right Google Drive link
acceptanceCriteria: User can ask in Telegram for a presentation using a natural-language request
Bot searches indexed presentations by filename and content
If one strong match is found, bot returns the presentation link
Response includes context such as title, path, or snippet
Only authorized users can use this flow

userStories.title: Clarify ambiguous search results
userStories.iWant: the bot to ask a clarifying question when several files may match
userStories.soThat: I can choose the correct presentation
acceptanceCriteria: If multiple strong matches are found, bot asks a clarifying question
Bot presents several candidate files
User can clarify or choose one option
Bot then returns the correct link

userStories.title: Show similar presentations when exact match is not found
userStories.iWant: to see similar presentations if the exact one is not found
userStories.soThat: I can still discover useful materials
acceptanceCriteria: If no exact match is found, bot responds with similar presentations
Suggestions are based on filename, content, or semantic relevance
Suggested results include links
Bot clearly labels them as similar results

userStories.title: Keep the library indexed
userStories.iWant: the Google Drive tree to be re-indexed automatically once per day
userStories.soThat: new and changed presentations become searchable
acceptanceCriteria: Bot indexes one Google Drive root folder and all nested subfolders
Scheduled sync runs once per day
Sync detects newly added files and updates the index
Index stores enough metadata for search and link retrieval
Failures are logged and visible to maintainers

userStories.title: Attach one internal comment to a presentation
userStories.iWant: to add one text comment to a presentation
userStories.soThat: the team can store lightweight internal context about the file
acceptanceCriteria: Each indexed presentation can have one text comment
Team members can create or update the comment
Comment is visible in search context or file details
Latest comment replaces the previous one
Only authorized users can edit comments

userStories.title: Upload a new presentation from Telegram
userStories.iWant: to send a file into a dedicated Telegram topic
userStories.soThat: the bot can help me add it into the presentation library
acceptanceCriteria: There is a dedicated Telegram topic for presentation intake
Authorized user can upload a presentation file into that topic
Bot suggests relevant destination folders
Bot presents several matching folders and an option to create a new folder
After confirmation, bot uploads the file to Google Drive into the selected folder
Uploaded file becomes searchable after indexing or immediate refresh

userStories.title: Create new folders during intake
userStories.iWant: to create a new destination folder during upload
userStories.soThat: new categories can be added without leaving Telegram
acceptanceCriteria: During intake, bot offers create-new-folder
User can specify the new folder name
Bot creates the folder under the configured Google Drive root or selected parent
Bot uploads the file into the new folder
New folder is included in future indexing

userStories.title: Enforce access by Telegram group membership
userStories.iWant: the feature to work only for members of the authorized Telegram group
userStories.soThat: the presentation base is not exposed outside the team
acceptanceCriteria: Authorized group id is configurable and set to 3784470567
Before responding in private chat, bot checks whether the user is a member of the authorized group
If user is not a member, bot does not provide search results or upload/comment access
Unauthorized access attempts do not leak file names or links

search: Search over file name, extracted content, folder path metadata, and optional internal comment
Return Google Drive shareable link for matched presentation
Ask for clarification when several strong matches exist
Show similar files when no exact match exists
indexing: Index one configured Google Drive root folder recursively
Run scheduled sync once per day
Store metadata including file id, file name, link, path, mime type, extracted text, last indexed timestamp, and internal comment
comments: Support one plain-text comment per presentation
intake: Provide dedicated Telegram topic for uploads
Upload selected file to Google Drive
authorization: Restrict access to members of Telegram group 3784470567
Block private chat responses for non-members
Apply same authorization policy to search, comment, and upload flows

search: User asks for a presentation in Telegram
No exact result returns similar files
upload: User uploads a file in the dedicated topic
Bot suggests folders or create-new-folder option
Bot uploads file to Google Drive
comment: Bot shows current comment if present

integrations: Storage/index layer for metadata and extracted content
searchApproach: Optional semantic relevance / embeddings for similar results
operationalNotes: Consider immediate partial refresh after successful upload
Log sync failures and permission errors
Handle moved files and indexing drift

edgeCases: Broad user query matches many files
Text extraction fails for some presentations
Drive permissions block read or upload
dependencies: Google Drive API credentials and root folder access
Telegram group membership checks and topic support
Content extraction pipeline for presentation formats

scope: Similar suggestions when no exact match exists
Upload to Google Drive and make files searchable

phases.name: Phase 2 — Ambiguity and recommendation UX
items: Add clarification flow for multiple matches
Show path and short context in results

phases.name: Phase 3 — Comments and intake workflow
items: Upload files to Google Drive and refresh index

phases.name: Phase 4 — Hardening and operations
items: Add logging, monitoring, and failure handling

definitionOfDone: Authorized team members can request presentations and receive relevant Google Drive links
Search works across file names and presentation content
Bot asks clarifying questions for ambiguous matches
Bot suggests similar files when exact match is unavailable
Daily indexing keeps the base fresh
Each presentation supports one editable internal comment
Team members can upload files via a dedicated Telegram topic into existing or new folders
Non-members of the authorized Telegram group cannot access the feature
Google Drive root folder and subfolders are indexed recursively
